ddls:
CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "move_name" TEXT /* Name of the move */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the move */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the move */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power of the move (null if not applicable) */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the move (null if not applicable) */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation in which the move was introduced */,
  "pp" INTEGER /* Power Points (PP) of the move */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the move */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target of the move */,
  "contest_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contest type of the move */,
  "contest_effect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contest effect of the move */,
  "super_contest_effect_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the super contest effect of the move */,
  "is_z_move" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the move is a Z-Move */,
  "is_max_move" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the move is a Max Move */,
  "is_dynamaxed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the move can be used in Dynamax battles */,
  "is_non_standard" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the move is non-standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Normal, Grass, Bug) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "damage_relations" TEXT /* JSON column to store the type's damage relations */,
  "generation_introduced" INTEGER /* The generation in which the type was introduced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Physical, Status) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "generation_introduced" INTEGER /* The generation in which the category was introduced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generations" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generation */,
  "generation_name" TEXT /* Name of the generation (e.g., Generation 3, Generation 4) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the generation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the generation */,
  "version_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., Move tutor, TM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "generation_introduced" INTEGER /* The generation in which the method was introduced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_methods" (
  "move_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move-method relationship */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation in which the move can be learned by this method */,
  "method_order" INTEGER /* The order in which the method can be used to learn the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_methods_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_methods_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_methods_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the effect */,
  "generation_introduced" INTEGER /* The generation in which the effect was introduced */,
  "short_effect" TEXT /* A short description of the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_effect_relationships" (
  "move_effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move-effect relationship */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the effect */,
  "effect_order" INTEGER /* The order of the effect in the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_effect_relationships_effect_id FOREIGN KEY ("effect_id") REFERENCES move_effects ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_effect_relationships_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the development team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the move */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the move was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a move */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move */,
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the generation */,
  "version_power" INTEGER /* Power of the move in this version (null if not applicable) */,
  "version_accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the move in this version (null if not applicable) */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the move in this version */,
  "version_pp" INTEGER /* Power Points (PP) of the move in this version */,
  "version_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the move in this version */,
  "version_target" TEXT /* Target of the move in this version */,
  "version_is_z_move" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the move is a Z-Move in this version */,
  "version_is_max_move" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the move is a Max Move in this version */,
  "version_is_dynamaxed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the move can be used in Dynamax battles in this version */,
  "version_is_non_standard" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the move is non-standard in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_versions_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_versions_generation_id FOREIGN KEY ("generation_id") REFERENCES generations ("generation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle event */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move used in the battle */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date of the battle */,
  "battle_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the battle (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who used the move */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Pokémon that used the move */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent Pokémon */,
  "battle_type" TEXT /* Type of battle (e.g., single, double) */,
  "battle_location" TEXT /* Location where the battle took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_battles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_battles_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)
